name: io.github.codespar/mcp-brasil-api
description: CEP, CNPJ, banks, holidays, FIPE, DDD — BrasilAPI (free, no key)

tools.name: get_cep
tools.description: Look up address by CEP (Brazilian postal code)

tools.name: get_cnpj
tools.description: Look up company information by CNPJ

tools.name: get_banks
tools.description: List all Brazilian banks with codes and names

tools.name: get_holidays
tools.description: List national holidays for a given year

tools.name: get_fipe_brands
tools.description: List vehicle brands by type from FIPE table

tools.name: get_fipe_price
tools.description: Get vehicle price from FIPE table by code

tools.name: get_ddd
tools.description: Get state and cities for a DDD (area code)

tools.name: get_isbn
tools.description: Look up book information by ISBN

tools.name: get_ncm
tools.description: Look up NCM tax classification code

tools.name: get_cptec_weather
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a city (CPTEC/INPE)
